results.rendered_html:
adāyika a. (kī f.) [dāyamarhati dāya-ṭhak na. ba.]
1 That which is not claimed by an heir; destitute of heirs; adāyikaṃ dhanaṃ rājagāmi  Kāty. 
2 Not relating to inheritance.
